name: @swarmai/channel-whatsapp-webjs
description: SwarmAI channel plugin: WhatsApp Personal via whatsapp-web.js (puppeteer-driven WhatsApp Web). Heavier but media-reliable. Pair as a linked device.
//deps: whatsapp-web.js + puppeteer-core are runtime deps. We use puppeteer-core (NOT puppeteer) to avoid bundling Chromium — the plugin reuses system Chrome detected at runtime via the same probe document.ts uses for PDF generation. This keeps the install size small and mirrors the user's existing Chrome.
//channel-kind: Channel kind is 'whatsapp-webjs' (NEW). Pairs as a separate WhatsApp Linked Device — operators can run this AND channel-whatsapp-baileys simultaneously on the same WhatsApp account (Multi-Device supports up to 4 devices).
